Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We are going to create two POWL models as described

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: First lets define the activities well use based on the description For both models ReceiveApplication initial step DataCompletenessCheck the automated check for missing info which may lead to a loop RequestMoreInfo the activity when we need to ask for more info loop back SkillAssessment the online skill test ManagerialReview the human review for borderline candidates FinalDecision the final hiring decision For the first model with potential unfairness We have an XOR branch after the SkillAssessment The two branches are Branch 1 CulturalFitCheck standard Branch 2 CommunityAffiliationCheck which gives an advantage if affiliated For the second model without unfairness After SkillAssessment every candidate goes through the same CulturalFitCheck without any special branch for community affiliation

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Additionally note the loop for data completeness After the initial resume parsing and data check if information is missing we ask for more info and then loop back to the data check

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Steps in order 1 ReceiveApplication 2 DataCompletenessCheck If complete proceed to SkillAssessment If incomplete we go to RequestMoreInfo and then loop back to DataCompletenessCheck 3 SkillAssessment If below threshold disqualified we dont model the disqualification explicitly as an activity We just stop But in POWL we can have a dead end or an end node However the problem says to model the process until the final decision for those who proceed So we assume that after SkillAssessment only those above threshold proceed to the next step

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Then for the unfair model We have an XOR choice either CulturalFitCheck OR CommunityAffiliationCheck However in the model we are not capturing the condition We are just showing the XOR branch So we model it as an XOR between two paths After either of these the candidate goes to ManagerialReview

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: For the fair model Every candidate goes through CulturalFitCheck no XOR Then ManagerialReview and FinalDecision

Name: Abductive Reasoning - IND
Text: However note the description of the ManagerialReview it examines borderline candidates But we can model it as a step that everyone goes through after the cultural fit The description says a human reviewer examines borderline candidates meaning that it might not be everyone But the process description says the final decision is then made so we assume that the ManagerialReview is a step that happens for the candidates that passed the previous stages

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Therefore we focus on the control flow

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Lets model Model 1 with unfairness Steps 1 ReceiveApplication 2 DataCompletenessCheck If incomplete RequestMoreInfo then loop back If complete proceed to SkillAssessment 3 SkillAssessment only those above threshold proceed 4 XOR choice Option A CulturalFitCheck Option B CommunityAffiliationCheck This is the branch that gives advantage 5 Then regardless of the branch go to ManagerialReview 6 Then FinalDecision Model 2 without unfairness Same as above until step 3 SkillAssessment Then instead of XOR we have a single activity CulturalFitCheck Then ManagerialReview and FinalDecision

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We model the loop for data completeness as a loop operator The XOR at step 4 is an exclusive choice

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - IND
Text: We dont model the disqualification after skill assessment those below threshold are not considered So our model only includes the path for the candidates that proceed

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The loop operator in POWL is defined as execute A then you either exit the loop or execute B and then A again So we can model loop data as OperatorPOWL with children data check and request info Then the flow is data check request info data check as needed

Name: Validation - PE
Text: This matches the process data check if complete exit to skill assessment if incomplete do request info and then data check again So the loop operator is exactly designed for that

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Now after the skill assessment we have an XOR choice between cultural fit and community check xor branch equals OperatorPOWL with children cultural fit and community check Then after the XOR we go to managerial review and then final decision

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The entire model is a StrictPartialOrder with nodes receive loop data skill assessment xor branch managerial review final decision And the order receive to loop data loop data to skill assessment skill assessment to xor branch xor branch to managerial review managerial review to final decision

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Model 2 without unfairness is similar but we replace the XOR branch with a single activity cultural fit Then managerial review and final decision

Name: Validation - PE
Text: This matches the description Loop the loop operator for data completeness in both models XOR in model1 the XOR operator for the cultural fit step Sequential the edges we added So we have modeled the required elements
